text.title: Structured Output — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by provider availability + schema complexity to a structured-output mode.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the schema contain recursive types or unbounded depth?

conclusion.verdict: FLATTEN schema to parent-id references first; recursive schemas unsupported
mode=response_format with json_schema; use Pydantic via beta.chat.completions.parse
mode=tool_use_json with input_schema; route via tools.use API
STOP — switch to a structured-output-capable provider; manual prompting unreliable

example.code: recursive=false → q-provider → openai → r1-provider-native-first verdict: response_format + Pydantic
